chat.title: Claudio
slash.commands.branch: Run git checkout -b in integrated terminal
slash.commands.commit: Ask LLM to write a commit message from staged diff
slash.commands.commit-push-pr: Commit, push and open PR via terminal
slash.commands.compact: Ask LLM to summarize the conversation so far
slash.commands.diff: Ask LLM to explain current git diff
slash.commands.files: Ask LLM about open workspace files
slash.commands.plan: Toggle step-by-step planning before each answer
slash.commands.pr-comments: Show PR comments via gh CLI in terminal
slash.commands.review: Ask LLM to review changes vs main branch
slash.commands.simplify: Ask LLM to simplify the active editor file
slash.commands.status: Show proxy connection status and config
